ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stock_prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock price record */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the stock price data */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the stock on the given date */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the stock on the given date */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock on the given date */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the stock on the given date */,
  "adj_close_price" REAL /* Adjusted closing price of the stock on the given date */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Volume of shares traded on the given date */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the company the stock price data belongs to */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the company on the given date */,
  "sector_performance" REAL /* Sector performance on the given date */,
  "industry_performance" REAL /* Industry performance on the given date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_prices_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "ticker" TEXT /* Stock ticker symbol */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry the company operates in */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector the company belongs to */,
  "headquarters" TEXT /* Location of the company's headquarters */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the company */,
  "website" TEXT /* Company website */,
  "ipo_date" TEXT /* Date of the company's initial public offering (IPO) */,
  "employee_count" INTEGER /* Number of employees */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_companies_sector FOREIGN KEY ("sector") REFERENCES sector ("sector_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_companies_industry FOREIGN KEY ("industry") REFERENCES industry ("industry_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., investor, analyst, admin) */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the company the user is associated with (if applicable) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the user joined the platform */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the stock price data */,
  "price_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock price data being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the stock price data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_price_id FOREIGN KEY ("price_id") REFERENCES stock_prices ("price_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who set the alert */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company the alert is for */,
  "alert_date" TEXT /* Date when the alert was set */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., price increase, price decrease) */,
  "alert_threshold" REAL /* Threshold for triggering the alert (e.g., 5% increase) */,
  "alert_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the alert (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company the report is for */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., trend analysis, performance summary) */,
  "report_file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report */,
  "report_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "company_financials" (
  "financial_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial record */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company the financial data belongs to */,
  "fiscal_year" TEXT /* Fiscal year of the financial data */,
  "revenue" REAL /* Annual revenue of the company */,
  "net_income" REAL /* Net income of the company */,
  "total_assets" REAL /* Total assets of the company */,
  "total_liabilities" REAL /* Total liabilities of the company */,
  "gross_margin" REAL /* Gross margin of the company */,
  "operating_margin" REAL /* Operating margin of the company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("financial_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_company_financials_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "company_news" (
  "news_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each news article */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company the news article is about */,
  "news_date" TEXT /* Date of the news article */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the news article */,
  "article_url" TEXT /* URL to the news article */,
  "article_text" TEXT /* Text content of the news article */,
  "sentiment_score" REAL /* Sentiment score of the news article */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("news_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_company_news_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "company_events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company the event is for */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date of the event */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., earnings call, product launch) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  "event_url" TEXT /* URL to the event details */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_company_events_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_preferences" (
  "preference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user preference */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user whose preference is being stored */,
  "setting_name" TEXT /* Name of the setting or preference */,
  "setting_value" TEXT /* Value of the setting or preference */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the preference was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("preference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_preferences_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "industry" (
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each industry */,
  "industry_name" TEXT /* Name of the industry */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the industry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("industry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sector" (
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sector */,
  "sector_name" TEXT /* Name of the sector */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sector */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sector_id")
)
